area.value: one weapon/level, no two of which can be more than 20 ft. apart

description.value: Each weapon this spell affects each shines with pale light that dimly illuminates a 5-foot square. These weapons also ignore the DR of evil creatures that have DR 5 or lower, as long as the damage reduction is not DR /epic.
